issues.title: [Feature Request] Add isMalicious.com as a data source
issues.author: hexablob
issues.reason: API key required for blocklist access; free tier rate limits too restrictive
issues.comment: The isMalicious.com service requires authentication with an API key for blocklist downloads. The free tier (1 request/hour, 30 requests/month) is insufficient for automated blocklist updates. Without a public, authenticated API or a working direct download URL, we cannot evaluate this source. If you have a valid API key that can be securely integrated into our CI/CD pipeline, please provide the details and we will re-evaluate.

issues.title: 0.0.0.0 does not work with IPv6.
issues.author: alsyundawy
issues.reason: Requires decision on IPv6 support strategy (backward compatibility, file size)
issues.comment: Issue acknowledged as valid enhancement. This requires community discussion on IPv6 support strategy. The current format uses "0.0.0.0 domain" which only blocks IPv4. Adding ":: domain" entries would double file size and requires compatibility testing.

issues.title: [Remove Request] video-fa.scdn.co = Spotify music video CDN
issues.author: mefail
issues.reason: No evidence provided; reporter claims false-positive without verification
issues.comment: Remove request received but no evidence of false-positive provided. We could not verify the domain is incorrectly listed. If this domain is causing issues, please provide a public source or logs showing it is not malware/phishing. Without verification, the entry will remain in the blocklist for protection.

issues.title: [Add request] - tiktok domains
issues.author: tayl
issues.reason: Add request without proper template; needs domain list and evidence
issues.comment: This issue lacks a proper domain list and supporting evidence. Please use the issue template to provide the list of TikTok domains to add and evidence supporting their inclusion (e.g., logs showing they serve ads/malware).

issues.title: Are these lists actually being maintained?
issues.author: dbiers
issues.reason: Maintenance question; not a standard add/remove request
issues.comment: The lists in this repository are actively maintained. We triage new issues daily and merge PRs as verified. If you have specific concerns about a particular list, please file a separate issue with details.

issues.title: [Remove Request] - unizar.es (and its subdomains)
issues.author: Jajajavi2203
issues.reason: No evidence provided; domain appears to be a legitimate university domain
issues.comment: Remove request received but no evidence of false-positive provided. We could not verify the domain is incorrectly listed. unizar.es is a legitimate university domain. Without verification, the entry will remain in the blocklist for protection.

issues.comment: Remove request received but no evidence of false-positive provided. We could not verify the domain is incorrectly listed. The domain appears in multiple phishing databases. Without verification, the entry will remain in the blocklist for protection.
